package.name: depthai_ros_msgs
package.description: depthai_ros_msgs interface package — vendored SUBSET (SpatialDetection, SpatialDetectionArray) with the authentic upstream field layout, so the Isaac sim publishes the exact type the real OAK-D / depthai_ros_driver uses on the TurtleBot4 (/oakd/nn/spatial_detections). Sourced from luxonis/depthai-ros (humble). Not the full upstream package — only the messages this project needs.
